title: Who Won the Actor Awards Red Carpet? Demi Moore, Jenna Ortega and Others Top the List
summary: A trio of Paris-based houses — Louis Vuitton, Schiaparelli and Balenciaga — took the top spots in THR's Power Rankings among fashion brands that dominated style and social media conversations.

title: Daniel Radcliffe On Embracing Fear (and Audience Participation) in His New Broadway Show
summary: The actor is starring in the one-man 'Every Brilliant Thing' with a big assist from the audience.
